author: Lisa Levin
headline: 4 Stocks Insiders Are Selling
summary: When insiders sell shares, it indicates their concern in the company’s prospects or that they view the stock as being overpriced. Either way, this signals an opportunity to go short on the stock. Insider sales should not be taken as the only indicator for making an investment or trading decision. At best, it can lend conviction to a selling decision.

author: Chris Katje
headline: Where Do Video Game Accounts, Purchases Go After The Player Dies?
summary:
Video games and mobile games have risen in popularity over the years. The industry has also seen a rise in the amount spent through in-game purchases.

This leaves the unlikely question of what happens to your video game account and the purchases after you die. A new patent could reveal the answer.
